zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll於1489年8月9日出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾時，她的父親Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll24歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll30歲。她於1504年與Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll于1489年8月9日出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾时，她的父亲Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll24岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll30岁。她于1504年与Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll was born on 9 August 1489, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, was 24 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, was 30. She married Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis in 1504, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1529, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Islay, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll est née le 9 août 1489, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis en 1504, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1529, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Islay, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll am 9. August 1489 in Glenorchy, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll 30. Sie hat 1504 in Schottland, United Kingdom Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1529 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Islay, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll è nata il il 9 agosto 1489 nel Glenorchy, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis nel 1504, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1529, nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Islay, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyllが1489年8月9日にイギリススコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで生まれた時，父Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyllは24歳，母Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyllは30歳であった。1504年にイギリススコットランドでGilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルイスレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll(이)가 1489년 8월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll nasceu em 9 de agosto de 1489, em Glenorchy, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis em 1504, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1529, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Islay, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll родилась 9 августа 1489 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis в 1504 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1529 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.BET 1514 AND 1517: mai le 1514 e o'o I le 1517

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll nació el 9 de agosto de 1489, en Glenorchy, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Gilbert Kennedy 2nd Earl of Cassillis en 1504, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1529, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Islay, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido.
